title: Registry Identity, SBOM, Provenance, Attestations, and Promotion · Delivery-System Trace: Ci Slsa Level Claim Boundary
summary: A release promotes a mutable tag, rebuilds for production, stores an SBOM separately from the image, generates provenance with leaked build args, and never verifies attestations downstream. Planned artifact: Add and verify the ci slsa level claim boundary increment in attested image release record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Map actual build and source controls to SLSA 1.2 tracks and levels without claiming transitive dependency or code-quality guarantees.
Verify signature, issuer, subject, source repository, workflow identity, builder, digest, predicate, and policy before promotion or deployment.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

content.code:
# Worked focus: ci-slsa-level-claim-boundary — Map actual build and source controls to SLSA 1.2 tracks and levels without claiming transitive dependency or code-quality guarantees.
  # Evidence: ci-worked-ci-image-release-attestations-2
  - competency: ci-worked-ci-image-release-attestations-2
    artifact: attested-release.yaml
    decision: worked ci image release attestations 2
    environment: trusted release tag requiring an environment approval
    fault-injection: route five percent traffic to a revision with a data incompatibility
    retained-proof: accessible redacted timeline with owner expiry and regression control
    case-key: worked2
    change: |
      subject: registry.example.test/status@sha256:verified
      tags: [v2.4.0, stable]
      sbom: spdx-attached
      provenance: mode-max
      builder: github-hosted-reviewed-workflow
      actions-attest: 4
      attestation-subject: exact-digest
      verification: issuer-repository-workflow-builder-subject
      promotion: same-digest
      rollback: prior-verified-digest
    verify: verify image digest SBOM provenance signature issuer repository workflow builder subject predicate policy and promotion identity
    failure: Reject tags as identity, detached unbound SBOM, build-arg secrets, signature-only trust, unverified attestations, or transitive SLSA claims.
    repair: Bind metadata to digest, generate safe attestations, verify identity and expectations downstream, promote once, and state SLSA limits.
content.caption: Runnable CI/CD workflow, artifact, release, and transfer-evidence contract example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.
